title: Canonical Literature Publication Status Policy
scope: Canonical publication-status overlay for audited literature routes.

statusVocabulary.partial-reviewed: A bounded reviewed extract is available; the complete work is not claimed.
statusVocabulary.source-register: Bibliographic, structural or authorship information is available without verified complete verse text.
statusVocabulary.navigation: The page is a route or section navigator rather than a complete reading edition.

records.contentScope: Linked-verse form register; verse text awaits verification.
records.evidenceMarker: will be published only after the original text is verified

limitations: Only eight evidence-backed literature routes are reconciled.
The historical route registry remains a historical snapshot.
